labels.analysis: The MCP Server "PO6 Mailbox" provides 26 tools for development tools tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Development Tools" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: List all mailboxes the API key has access to, with basic stats for each

tools.name: get_mailbox_stats
tools.description: Get detailed statistics for a specific mailbox including email counts, storage usage, and folder breakdown

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID to get stats for

tools.name: list_emails
tools.description: List emails in a mailbox with optional filtering. Returns email metadata without full content.

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID to list emails from

folder.description: Filter by folder (inbox, spam, archive, trash, or custom folder name)

limit.description: Maximum number of emails to return (1-100)

offset.description: Number of emails to skip for pagination

from_filter.description: Filter by sender email address (partial match)

subject_contains.description: Filter by subject containing this text

since.description: Only return emails received after this ISO 8601 date

until.description: Only return emails received before this ISO 8601 date

tools.name: get_email
tools.description: Get the full content of a specific email including body text, HTML, headers, and attachment metadata

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID containing the email

mark_as_read.description: Automatically mark the email as read when retrieved

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search emails across one or all accessible mailboxes using text search

query.description: Search query to match against sender, subject, and snippet

mailbox_id.description: Optional: limit search to a specific mailbox

tools.name: mark_email
tools.description: Mark an email as read/unread or starred/unstarred

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID containing the email

is_read.description: Set read status (true = read, false = unread)

is_starred.description: Set starred status (true = starred, false = unstarred)

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move an email to a different folder

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID containing the email

folder.description: Target folder (inbox, spam, archive, trash, or custom folder name)

tools.name: delete_email
tools.description: Permanently delete an email. This action cannot be undone. Consider moving to trash first. Requires a two-step confirmation: first call returns a confirmation_token, second call with the token performs the deletion.

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID containing the email

confirmation_token.description: Confirmation token from the first call. Required to actually perform the deletion.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List all folders in a mailbox including system folders and custom folders

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID to list folders for

tools.name: list_email_lists
tools.description: List all email contact lists for the user. Email lists help organize contacts for outreach campaigns and bulk operations. Requires a paid plan (Standard or Plus).

tools.name: get_email_list_contacts
tools.description: Get contacts from a specific email list. Returns contact details including email, name, company, and status. Only active contacts can receive emails.

list_id.description: The email list ID to get contacts from

status.description: Filter by contact status (active, unsubscribed, bounced). Default: all statuses.

limit.description: Maximum number of contacts to return (1-200)

offset.description: Number of contacts to skip for pagination

tools.name: compose_email
tools.description: Compose and send a new email to one or more recipients. Requires a paid plan (Standard or Plus). Rate limits vary by plan (Standard: 30/hr, 200/day; Plus: 60/hr, 500/day).

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID to send from

body_text.description: Plain text body of the email

body_html.description: Optional HTML body. If not provided, body_text will be converted to HTML.

tools.name: reply_email
tools.description: Reply to an email. The reply will be sent from the mailbox's email address to the original sender. Rate limited per plan (Standard: 30/hr, Plus: 60/hr).

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID containing the email to reply to

email_id.description: The email ID to reply to

body_text.description: Plain text body of the reply

body_html.description: Optional HTML body of the reply. If not provided, body_text will be used.

tools.name: forward_email
tools.description: Forward an email to one or more recipients. The forward will be sent from the mailbox's email address. Rate limited per plan (Standard: 30/hr, Plus: 60/hr). Max recipients per plan (Standard: 5, Plus: 10).

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID containing the email to forward

to_addresses.description: List of email addresses to forward to (max 5)

message.description: Optional message to include above the forwarded email

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List email templates available for composing emails. Templates contain pre-written subject and body content with optional variables like {{first_name}} that can be filled in.

mailbox_id.description: Optional: filter templates for a specific mailbox. If omitted, returns all templates.

category.description: Optional: filter by category (general, outreach, followup, newsletter)

tools.name: get_template
tools.description: Get the full content of an email template including subject, body, and variables.

tools.name: create_draft
tools.description: Create a draft email for the user to review and approve before sending. This is the preferred way for AI agents to compose emails - the user can review, edit, and approve drafts from the web dashboard. Drafts expire after 72 hours if not acted on. Rate limited per plan.

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID to create the draft for

body_text.description: Plain text body of the email

body_html.description: Optional HTML body. If not provided, body_text will be converted to HTML.

template_id.description: Optional: template ID to base the draft on

scheduled_at.description: Optional: ISO 8601 date to schedule the send for (e.g., "2025-01-15T09:00:00Z"). If set, the email will be sent at this time after approval.

tools.name: list_drafts
tools.description: List draft emails pending review. Shows drafts created by AI agents that the user can approve or reject.

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID to list drafts for

status.description: Filter by status: pending_review, approved, rejected, sent, expired

limit.description: Maximum number of drafts to return (1-50)

tools.name: list_sent_emails
tools.description: List emails sent from a mailbox. Shows all sent emails whether sent by the user (web), AI agent (MCP), or API. Includes delivery status and sent_via source.

mailbox_id.description: The mailbox ID to list sent emails for

sent_via.description: Optional: filter by how the email was sent

limit.description: Maximum number of emails to return (1-100)

offset.description: Number of emails to skip for pagination

tools.name: list_aliases
tools.description: List all @po6.com forwarding aliases owned by the user. Returns alias address, forwarding destination, subscription plan, active status, and plus addressing settings.

tools.name: get_alias
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific @po6.com alias including forwarding destination, verification status, subscription plan, plus addressing, and URL redirect settings.

tools.name: update_alias
tools.description: Update a @po6.com alias settings. Can change forwarding address (triggers re-verification), toggle active status, or configure plus addressing. Cannot create or delete aliases.

forward_to.description: New forwarding email address (will require re-verification)

is_active.description: Enable or disable the alias (requires active subscription)

plus_addressing_enabled.description: Enable or disable plus addressing (e.g. alias+tag@po6.com)

plus_tag_auto_label.description: Automatically label forwarded emails with the plus tag

tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: List all custom (BYOD) domains owned by the user. Returns domain name, verification status, catchall config, alias count, and BYOD subscription plan with limits.

tools.name: get_domain
tools.description: Get detailed information about a custom domain including verification status, MX records, catchall configuration, aliases, and BYOD plan limits.

tools.name: update_domain_alias
tools.description: Update a domain alias settings. Can change forwarding address (triggers re-verification), toggle active status (subject to plan limits), or configure plus addressing.

domain_id.description: The domain ID containing the alias

alias_id.description: The domain alias ID to update

forward_to.description: New forwarding email address (will require re-verification)

is_active.description: Enable or disable the alias (subject to plan active alias limit)

plus_tag_auto_label.description: Automatically label forwarded emails with the plus tag

tools.name: update_catchall
tools.description: Enable, disable, or update the catchall configuration for a custom domain. Catchall forwards all unmatched emails to a specified address. Changing the forward address requires re-verification.

domain_id.description: The domain ID to configure catchall for

forward_to.description: Email address to forward catchall emails to (required when enabling)
